import java.util.*;

class Solution {
    public List<Integer> findAllPeople(int n, int[][] meetings, int firstPerson) {
        int[] secretTime = new int[n];
        Arrays.fill(secretTime, Integer.MAX_VALUE);
        secretTime[0] = 0;
        secretTime[firstPerson] = 0;
        
        Arrays.sort(meetings, (a, b) -> Integer.compare(a[2], b[2]));
        
        for (int[] meeting : meetings) {
            int x = meeting[0];
            int y = meeting[1];
            int t = meeting[2];
            if (secretTime[x] <= t || secretTime[y] <= t) {
                if (secretTime[x] > t) {
                    secretTime[x] = t;
                }
                if (secretTime[y] > t) {
                    secretTime[y] = t;
                }
            }
        }
        
        List<Integer> result = new ArrayList<>();
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            if (secretTime[i] != Integer.MAX_VALUE) {
                result.add(i);
            }
        }
        return result;
    }
}

solution: 
```java
import java.util.*;

class Solution {
    public List<Integer> findAllPeople(int n, int[][] meetings, int firstPerson) {
        int[] secretTime = new int[n];
        Arrays.fill(secretTime, Integer.MAX_VALUE);
        secretTime[0] = 0;
        secretTime[firstPerson] = 0;
        
        Arrays.sort(meetings, (a, b) -> Integer.compare(a[2], b[2]));
        
        for (int[] meeting : meetings) {
            int x = meeting[0];
            int y = meeting[1];
            int t = meeting[2];
            if (secretTime[x] <= t || secretTime[y] <= t) {
                if (secretTime[x] > t) {
                    secretTime[x] = t;
                }
                if (secretTime[y] > t) {
                    secretTime[y] = t;
                }
            }
        }
        
        List<Integer> result = new ArrayList<>();
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            if (secretTime[i] != Integer.MAX_VALUE) {
                result.add(i);
            }
        }
        return result;
    }
}
```

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(M log M + N)
space complexity: O(N)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: The solution efficiently processes each meeting in chronological order, ensuring that the secret spreads correctly. By sorting the meetings and using an array to track the earliest time each person knows the secret, the approach ensures optimal performance and correctness.
